mutations.desc: Implement a SkyLang rule to monitor and reduce CPU resource usage when high CPU load situations occur.
mutations.benefit: Improved system performance by preventing CPU overload

mutations.desc: Implement a new, CPU-friendly algorithm for sorting arrays to reduce load on the system.
mutations.benefit: Improved performance and reduced CPU usage

mutations.desc: Implement a single-threaded, iterative approach to sorting arrays in Skyd V0.5, replacing the current multi-threaded implementation for improved CPU efficiency.
mutations.benefit: Reduced CPU usage by up to 30% due to the elimination of thread context switching.
